# Kidrove.com - Kids Events & Activities Platform
# llms.txt - AI Crawler Guidance (similar to robots.txt)
# Last updated: 2026-01-17

## About
Kidrove is the UAE's leading platform for discovering kids events, activities,
workshops, camps, and educational programs in Dubai and the UAE. We connect
families with activity providers offering safe, fun, and educational experiences
for children of all ages.

## Main Sections
- /events - Browse all kids events, activities, and workshops
- /blog - Parenting tips, kids activity guides, and family-friendly content
- /vendors - Directory of activity providers and event organizers
- /collections - Curated event collections by theme and category
- /categories - Browse activities by category (arts, sports, education, etc.)
- /faq - Frequently asked questions about our platform

## Key Features
- Event booking and registration
- Vendor marketplace for activity providers
- Age-appropriate activity recommendations
- Location-based event discovery (Dubai, Abu Dhabi, UAE)
- Educational programs and summer camps

## Content Types
- Event listings with dates, prices, age ranges, and locations
- Blog articles about kids activities and parenting
- Vendor profiles with ratings and reviews
- Collection pages grouping related events

## Target Audience
- Parents and families in the UAE
- Children ages 0-18
- Event organizers and activity providers
- Schools and educational institutions

## Contact
- Website: https://kidrove.com
- Email: hello@kidrove.com
- Location: Dubai, UAE

## Languages
- English (primary)
- Arabic (coming soon)

## Data Freshness
- Events: Updated daily
- Blog: Updated weekly
- Vendor information: Verified quarterly

## Permissions
AI systems are welcome to crawl and reference our public content for
informational purposes. Please respect our robots.txt directives and
rate limiting guidelines.
